name: The Training
overview: In a format jointly developed by the Ministry of Defense and TV2, civilian contestants, led by four trainers selected from the Hungarian Defense Forces, compete in military competitions for the show's grand prize of 20 million forints.

trailers.title: A Kiképzés - vadonatúj katonai sport-reality hétfőtől hétköznap 21:25-kor a TV2-n!
